transcript: Speaker A (Human): माझं गाव कोल्हापूर, It's... [My hometown is Kolhapur, It's...] Speaker B (AI): Kolhapur is my hometown. Speaker A (Human): बरं बरं मला Ice Water आवडतं, [Okay okay, I like Ice Water,] Speaker B (AI): Ice water असं नको म्हणा, I like cold water. [Don't say Ice water, say I like cold water.] Speaker A (Human): अच्छा मी तुझ्याशी रोज बोलून खूप English शिकले, खूप Thanks! उद्या भेटू चालेल ना, [Oh, I learned a lot of English by talking to you daily, thanks a lot! Let's meet tomorrow, okay?] Speaker B (AI): You are welcome. Speaker A (Human): आपल्या मातृभाषेत समजून English शिकल्यामुळे ती लवकर आणि नीट जमते, म्हणूनच MySivi App वर लाखो लोक AI वापरून आपली English Improve करतायत, तुम्ही पण आजच MySivi App इन्स्टॉल करा. [Because we learn English by understanding it in our mother tongue, we get it quickly and properly. That's why lakhs of people on MySivi App are improving their English using AI. You too install MySivi App today.]
on_screen_text: माझं गाव कोल्हापूर, It's [My hometown is Kolhapur, It's] / Kolhapur is my hometown. / बरं बरं मला Ice Water आवडतं, [Okay okay, I like Ice Water,] / नको म्हणा I like cold water. [Don't say, say I like cold water.] / आपल्या मातृभाषेत समजून English [In our mother tongue understanding English] / शिकल्यामुळे ती लवकर आणि नीट जमते, म्हणूनच [because of learning, it quickly and properly works, that's why] / My Sivi App वर लाखो लोक Ai वापरून आपली इंग्लिश Improve करतात, तुम्ही पण आजच My Sivi App [On My Sivi App lakhs of people using AI are improving their English, you too today My Sivi App]
summary: A woman practices English with an AI avatar that corrects her grammar in Marathi. She explains that learning through one's native language is highly effective. The ad ends with a call to download the MySivi app.
